title: 致经济下行的我们
description:
As an unemployed college student, you were unable to adapt to the era of economic decline, were eliminated by the big city, and eventually returned to your hometown. Once you left your hometown vowing to make a name for yourself, now you return in disgrace. The economic order of the world is collapsing, and as an ordinary person, you can only watch silently. But before that... The ties you once left behind in this hometown are returning to your side. Realize yourself, regroup, and roar towards the era that once abandoned you, changing this despised world!

A 2D visual novel game that combines elements of party building, character development, random events, Galgame elements, collectibles, and life simulation gameplay.

78 plot events, 70 simulated gameplay event endings, 24 collectibles, and 3 IF (Interactive Fiction) endings

It adopts a character development model and also features in-game modifications. If you don't want to develop the character, you can directly enable the modifications, skip the tedious steps, and directly enjoy the storyline.
description_short: 集回合、养成、随机事件、Galgame、藏品、人生模拟、危机系统等玩法的一款2D视觉恋爱小说游戏。内含78个剧情事件、70个模拟玩法事件结局、24个藏品、3个IF线结局。
